arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag explains Marcus Rashford's absence from Man Utd XI - 'Not a difficult decision'
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been dropped to the substitutes bench for Manchester United's Premier League match against Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park after scoring three goals in a week

arts.ttl: Why Marcus Rashford is on the bench for Manchester United vs Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has three goals in his last two games but is on the bench for the first time this season.

arts.ttl: Why Manuel Ugarte doesn't start for Manchester United vs Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Manuel Ugarte has been left out of the starting XI for Man United's tussle with Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park on Saturday evening.

arts.ttl: Palace launch revolutionary vision enhancement technology for fans with sight loss
arts.sum: In a ground-breaking initiative, Crystal Palace FC, in partnership with GiveVision and Shared Access, will become the first football club in English history to offer a revolutionary vision enhancement system for fans with sight loss.

arts.ttl: Ethan Wheatley scores as Manchester United Under-21s suffer derby day defeat to Man City
arts.sum: Man United's Under-21s were beaten by rivals Manchester City in Saturday's mini Manchester derby at the club's Carrington training base.

arts.ttl: Team News: One change for Palace against Man Utd
arts.sum: Adam Wharton returns to Crystal Palace’s starting XI, the Eagles’ only change from their midweek win over Queens Park Rangers in the Carabao Cup.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Manchester United: Erik ten Hag gives a BRUTAL response to questions over dropping Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of the Premier League clash between Crystal Palace and Manchester United as we provide you with all the build-up, team news and live action from the game.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Man Utd LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups from Selhurst Park
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag hopes to end Man Utd’s poor fortune at Selhurst Park with a first win in four years

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Manchester United LIVE! Premier League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner needs another big win over Erik ten Hag

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Manchester United live early team news and kick-off time plus how to watch
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, George Smith, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Live updates from Selhurst Park as Man United take on Crystal Palace in Saturday's teatime kick-off in the Premier League.
